body.zh-TW: `search_nodes`、`get_node`、`traverse`、`list_by_tag` 等工具的描述已更新，新增一行說明如何使用 `workspace_id` 參數查詢特定知識庫，或省略以使用預設值 `MEMTRACE_WS`。
body.en: The descriptions for tools like `search_nodes`, `get_node`, `traverse`, and `list_by_tag` have been updated to include a line explaining how to pass `workspace_id` to query a specific KB, or omit it to use the configured default (`MEMTRACE_WS`).
